functions.author: Choascraft
functions.title: Penguin Guide
pages:
Penguin Guide

Notes from the cold-water keepers, fish counters, egg watchers, and oil brewers of Choascraft.

Fact 1

Penguins are birds, but they do not fly. Their wings work like strong flippers for swimming.

Fact 2

Their black back and pale belly are countershading. From above and below, the pattern helps them blend into the water.

Fact 3

Penguins eat ocean food such as fish, squid, and krill. Different species hunt different prey.

Fact 4

Dense feathers trap air and help keep cold water away from the skin.

Fact 5

Penguins molt by replacing old feathers. During a heavy molt, many stay on land until the new coat is ready.

Fact 6

Many penguins recognize mates and chicks by voice, even in crowded colonies.

Fact 7

Penguin chicks hatch with soft down. They need time before they are ready for the water.

Fact 8

Penguins can drink salty seawater. Special glands help remove extra salt from the body.

Fact 9

On land penguins may walk, hop, or slide. In water they become fast, accurate hunters.

Fact 10

Penguin nests can be made from stones, plants, burrows, or simple open ground depending on the species.

Choascraft Drops

Penguins can drop Fish Bone and Penguin Meat. They may rarely drop a Penguin Egg or Penguin Blubber.

Cooking

Penguin Meat can be cooked in a furnace, smoker, or campfire to make Cooked Penguin Meat.

Oil Recipe

Use a brewing stand:
Input: Bucket
Reagent: Penguin Blubber
Result: Bucket of Oil

Oil Power

Bucket of Oil is a strong fuel source. Save it for long smelting runs and big projects.

Breeding

Adult penguins breed with cod, salmon, or tropical fish. A pregnant penguin looks for land and lays a Penguin Egg Block.

Eggs

Penguin eggs hatch after a short wait. The egg breaks and a baby king penguin appears.

Babies

Baby penguins grow over time and get larger as they age. Feed cod, salmon, or tropical fish to help them grow.

Taming Babies

Baby penguins can be tamed with cod, salmon, or tropical fish. Tamed penguins follow their owner after growing up.

Golden Dandelion

Use minecraft:golden_dandelion on a baby penguin to pause and reset growth so it stays little.

Follow Mode

A tamed penguin with normal eyes follows its owner. Interact with it to switch modes.

Hunt Mode

A tamed penguin with red eyes is hunting. It searches water, attacks fish, and can pick up floating items.

Fish Gifts

When a tamed hunting penguin catches a fish, it returns to its owner and gives a Fish Bone.

Loose Items

A hunting penguin can pick up floating items in water and bring them back to its owner.

Mode Toggle

Interact with a tamed penguin again to leave hunt mode and return to follow mode.

Guild Note

Respect the colony, watch the ice, and keep fish ready. A good penguin keeper wastes nothing.
